'''âp-s-z''' ('''pasaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pollicate|pollicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pollicate|pollicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-s-z
|-
! Lemma
| pasaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pasazithi|pasazithi]] || [[word:pasaziji|pasaziji]] || [[word:pasazishi|pasazishi]] || [[word:pasazi|pasazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasazuthuth|pasazuthuth]] || [[word:pasazujuj|pasazujuj]] || [[word:pasazushush|pasazushush]] || [[word:pasaz|pasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasazuthu|pasazuthu]] || [[word:pasazuju|pasazuju]] || [[word:pasazushu|pasazushu]] || [[word:pasazu|pasazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasazufuth|pasazufuth]] || [[word:pasazufuj|pasazufuj]] || [[word:pasazufush|pasazufush]] || [[word:pasazuf|pasazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pasazethe|pasazethe]] || [[word:pasazeje|pasazeje]] || [[word:pasazeshe|pasazeshe]] || [[word:pasaze|pasaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasazothoth|pasazothoth]] || [[word:pasazojoj|pasazojoj]] || [[word:pasazoshosh|pasazoshosh]] || [[word:pasaz|pasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasazotho|pasazotho]] || [[word:pasazojo|pasazojo]] || [[word:pasazosho|pasazosho]] || [[word:pasazo|pasazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasazofoth|pasazofoth]] || [[word:pasazofoj|pasazofoj]] || [[word:pasazofosh|pasazofosh]] || [[word:pasazof|pasazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pasazĂŠthĂŠ|pasazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pasazĂŠjĂŠ|pasazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pasazĂŠshĂŠ|pasazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pasazĂŠ|pasazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasazathath|pasazathath]] || [[word:pasazajaj|pasazajaj]] || [[word:pasazashash|pasazashash]] || [[word:pasaz|pasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasazatha|pasazatha]] || [[word:pasazaja|pasazaja]] || [[word:pasazasha|pasazasha]] || [[word:pasaza|pasaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasazafath|pasazafath]] || [[word:pasazafaj|pasazafaj]] || [[word:pasazafash|pasazafash]] || [[word:pasazaf|pasazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pasazasha|pasazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopasazasha|gopasazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipasazasha|gokipasazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pasaznĂŒsha|pasaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopasaznknĂŒsha|gopasaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipasaznĂŒsha|gokipasaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pasazshĂ«sha|pasazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopasaznkshĂ«sha|gopasaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipasazshĂ«sha|gokipasazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pasazrosha|pasazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopasaznkrosha|gopasaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipasazrosha|gokipasazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pasazmusha|pasazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasaznkmusha|gopasaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasazmusha|gokipasazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pasazsherasha|pasazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopasaznksherasha|gopasaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipasazsherasha|gokipasazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pasazngasha|pasazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopasaznkngasha|gopasaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipasazngasha|gokipasazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pasazyasha|pasazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopasaznkyasha|gopasaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipasazyasha|gokipasazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pasazyamasha|pasazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopasaznkyamasha|gopasaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipasazyamasha|gokipasazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pasaznĂŒshĂ«sha|pasaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopasaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopasaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipasaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipasaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pasaznĂŒrosha|pasaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopasaznknĂŒrosha|gopasaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipasaznĂŒrosha|gokipasaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasaznĂŒmusha|pasaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasaznknĂŒmusha|gopasaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasaznĂŒmusha|gokipasaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pasazshĂ«nĂŒsha|pasazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopasaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopasaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipasazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipasazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pasazshĂ«rosha|pasazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopasaznkshĂ«rosha|gopasaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipasazshĂ«rosha|gokipasazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasazshĂ«musha|pasazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasaznkshĂ«musha|gopasaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasazshĂ«musha|gokipasazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pasazronĂŒsha|pasazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopasaznkronĂŒsha|gopasaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipasazronĂŒsha|gokipasazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pasazroshĂ«sha|pasazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopasaznkroshĂ«sha|gopasaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipasazroshĂ«sha|gokipasazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasazromusha|pasazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasaznkromusha|gopasaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasazromusha|gokipasazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pasazmunĂŒsha|pasazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopasaznkmunĂŒsha|gopasaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipasazmunĂŒsha|gokipasazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pasazmushĂ«sha|pasazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopasaznkmushĂ«sha|gopasaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipasazmushĂ«sha|gokipasazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pasazmurosha|pasazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopasaznkmurosha|gopasaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipasazmurosha|gokipasazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pasaz|pasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠz|pĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopasaz|hopasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠsĂŠz|hopĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopasaz|hohopasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠsĂŠz|hohopĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpasaz|nĂŒpasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠsĂŠz|nĂŒpĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpasaz|nĂŒnĂŒpasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠsĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpasaz|nĂŻpasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠsĂŠz|nĂŻpĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpasaz|nĂŻnĂŻpasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠsĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupasaz|lupasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠsĂŠz|lupĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupasaz|lulupasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠsĂŠz|lulupĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipasaz|lipasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠsĂŠz|lipĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipasaz|lilipasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠsĂŠz|lilipĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopasaz|kopasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠsĂŠz|kopĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopasaz|kokopasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠsĂŠz|kokopĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepasaz|kepasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠsĂŠz|kepĂŠsĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepasaz|kekepasaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠsĂŠz|kekepĂŠsĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
